label: Proposition
description: Whether the offer and brand idea are clear, motivating, and connected to consumer needs.

label: Reach
description: Whether enough consumers are being reached with enough continuity to convert equity into growth.

label: Resonance
description: Whether the brand message and experience are creating a meaningful response.

label: Available & Visible
description: Whether shoppers can find and notice the brand where demand should convert.

label: Value
description: Whether the price, pack, mix, and value equation support conversion.
